inputs.label: Grains
inputs.businessContext: Enter the mass in grains to be converted to grams.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from grains to grams. Change for custom conversions.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output; ensures adherence to quality tolerances.

inputs.label: Number of Batches
inputs.businessContext: If converting for multiple batches, enter the batch quantity for total mass.

formulas.primary: Math.round(grains * conversionFactor * batchCount * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
